name: Everything Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together butter, brown sugar and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in eggs, one at a time, until smooth. Add vanilla.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, oats, baking soda and salt. Stir into butter mixture to form sticky dough.
4. Stir in raisins, chocolate chunks and pecans.
5. Drop mixture by tablespoons onto greased baking sheet about 2 inches apart.
6. Bake in preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for about 10 to 12 minutes or until golden.
7. Cool partially on the baking sheet before transferring to a rack to cool completely.
